items.summary: Cisplatin is currently in FDA shortage with 23 active Oncology orders and no available formulary alternative.
items.rationale: Rule C2 applies: IV route, Oncology department, no available preferred alternative off shortage list. Active orders confirm clinical exposure.

alternatives.name: Carboplatin
alternatives.rationale: Same ATC class L01XA (platinum compounds), IV route match. Non-formulary — requires P&T expedited review.

items.recommended_action: Initiate P&T expedited review for carboplatin substitution protocol.

items.summary: Methotrexate IV shortage ongoing. 8 active orders across Oncology and Rheumatology. One formulary alternative available.
items.rationale: Rule W1 applies: formulary preferred drug, 8 active orders (1-20 range), one alternative available and not itself in shortage.

alternatives.name: Pemetrexed
alternatives.rationale: ATC class L01BA antimetabolite. IV route match. Indication overlap for some oncology uses — clinical review required.

items.recommended_action: Monitor supply levels. Review pemetrexed eligibility with clinical pharmacist.
